title: Fix passing typedef value as parameter

features.name: typedef used as type argument in parameterized class instantiation
features.description: Code should include a typedef used as a type argument when instantiating a parameterized class

features.name: $typename on parameterized class with typedef type argument
features.description: Code should include $typename() called on a parameterized class instantiated with a typedef type argument

features.name: typedef and explicit type equivalence in parameterized class
features.description: Code should include a comparison between a parameterized class instantiation using a typedef versus using the explicit type directly
